(1) These rules may be called the Passport (Amendment) Rules, 2006. (2) They shall come mto force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In Schedule I to the Passport Rules, 1980, for serial No. 6 (ii) and entries relating thereto, the following serial number and entries shall be substituted, namely : S.
